proposals.description:
Add container directive: 'The script uses gzip from GNU coreutils package, which is available in the Alpine Linux-based container images like alpine:3.12 or debian:stretch. The image name and tag would be something like this: 

`alpine:3.12` or `debian:stretch`'
proposals.unified_diff:
--- GUNZIP (original)
+++ GUNZIP (fixed)
@@ -328,6 +328,7 @@
 
 // === FILE: modules/nf-core/gunzip/main.nf ===
 process GUNZIP {
+    container 'The script uses gzip from GNU coreutils package, which is available in the Alpine Linux-based container images like alpine:3.12 or debian:stretch. The image name and tag would be something like this: 

`alpine:3.12` or `debian:stretch`'
     tag "${archive}"
     label 'process_single'
proposals.validation_output:
Container directive present but value mismatch: expected 'The script uses gzip from GNU coreutils package, which is available in the Alpine Linux-based container images like alpine:3.12 or debian:stretch. The image name and tag would be something like this:

proposals.description:
Add container directive: 'The script uses samtools for indexing and sequence data manipulation. The official Docker image for the latest version of Samtools is sequencing/samtools at version 1.12-r0 which you can use in a container directive like this:

```bash
process SAMTOOLS_FAIDX {
    container "docker://quay.io/biocontainers/samtools:1.12-r0"

    ... // the rest of your process definition goes here
}
```'
proposals.unified_diff:
--- SAMTOOLS_FAIDX (original)
+++ SAMTOOLS_FAIDX (fixed)
@@ -386,6 +386,7 @@
 
 // === FILE: modules/nf-core/samtools/faidx/main.nf ===
 process SAMTOOLS_FAIDX {
+    container 'The script uses samtools for indexing and sequence data manipulation. The official Docker image for the latest version of Samtools is sequencing/samtools at version 1.12-r0 which you can use in a container directive like this:

```bash
process SAMTOOLS_FAIDX {
    container "docker://quay.io/biocontainers/samtools:1.12-r0"

    ... // the rest of your process definition goes here
}
```'
     tag "$fasta"
     label 'process_single'
proposals.validation_output:
Container directive present but value mismatch: expected 'The script uses samtools for indexing and sequence data manipulation. The official Docker image for the latest version of Samtools is sequencing/samtools at version 1.12-r0 which you can use in a container directive like this:

```bash
process SAMTOOLS_FAIDX {
    container "docker://quay.io/biocontainers/samtools:1.12-r0"

    ... // the rest of your process definition goes here
}
```', got 'docker://quay.io/biocontainers/samtools:1.12-r0'.
